name: banking-microservices-demo
description: A Node.js banking microservices demo with account, transaction, and gateway services.

scripts.bootstrap: npm install && npm --prefix services/account-service install && npm --prefix services/transaction-service install && npm --prefix services/gateway-service install
scripts.start: npx concurrently "npm run start:account" "npm run start:transaction" "npm run start:gateway"
